areas.currentStatus: controlled real-write implementation complete and hardened (symlink-through-file escape fixed, atomic temp-file-plus-rename writes): the controlled write executor is implemented, internally wired, and tested for test-owned fixture, copied config tree, and temporary config targets; write, byte-exact backup, restore, rollback, post-write reread verification, and post-restore reread verification are proven for all seven families against copied temp targets; the gated active-config pilot module exists with a fifteen-gate preflight, and the copied active-config rehearsal is proven against the real config content with the source untouched; the live pilot is blocked by the AutoreloadDisabledConfirmed and NoRuntimeMutationPlanned gates because misc:disable_autoreload is false on this system; a review-only GUI status card with a permanently insensitive Apply control is proven in the GTK evidence matrix; executor wired for controlled targets true; executor wired for active config false; real write path enabled for controlled targets true; real write path enabled for active config false; active real config writes approved false; GUI live Apply controls enabled false; hyprctl reload enabled false; runtime mutation enabled false; first real config write approved false
areas.reason: The pilot path is implemented, rehearsed, and gate-blocked: with compositor autoreload enabled (misc:disable_autoreload=false), any active-config write would live-reload Hyprland, and runtime mutation is not approved. Unblocking requires a user decision: disable autoreload or explicitly approve the reload the pilot write would trigger, then run the env-gated ignored pilot test. Safe non-active-config defect fixes remain allowed.
areas.blockingDependency: explicit user decision on first active real config write pilot
areas.safeNextWork: approve or reject first active real config write pilot; safe non-active-config defect correction remains allowed
areas.mustNotDo: do not write the active real Hyprland config, enable live Apply controls, run hyprctl reload, run mutating hyprctl, mutate runtime, or perform the first active-config write without explicit approval

areas.reason: Real profile/mode switching requires explicit production activation and live proof.
areas.mustNotDo: do not switch real profiles or symlinks

areas.currentStatus: broad runtime preview system implemented and user-facing: all 341 scalar rows and 7 structured families classified; 135 rows live-previewable by default with real detail-pane controls (53 switches, 45 sliders, 3 spin rows, 22 color entries, 3 value entries, 9 dropdowns), Previewing Live status, Save/Revert/Cancel routed through the executor, throttled applies, session-drop and app-close revert; 78 dead-man rows disabled pending countdown UI; live gaps_in round trips proven for both the executor and the UI controller; hyprctl reload remains disabled; config writes never happen per slider tick
areas.reason: Per-setting live preview controls are wired and proven for the 135 default-previewable rows. The remaining preview work is the dead-man countdown/confirm UI for the 78 gated rows; high-risk enablement still requires explicit approval.
areas.blockingDependency: dead-man UI implementation and explicit approval for high-risk enablement
areas.safeNextWork: implement dead-man preview UI (countdown, confirm, auto-revert) for the 78 gated rows
areas.mustNotDo: do not run hyprctl reload, do not write config per slider tick, do not enable preview for blocked/not-proven rows, do not enable dead-man rows by default
evidenceUsed: tests/runtime_preview_ui_live.rs live UI controller smoke run
